section.heading: African Development Fund; United States participation

content.p: The President is hereby authorized to accept participation for the United States in the African Development Fund (hereinafter referred to as the “Fund”) provided for by the agreement establishing the Fund (hereinafter referred to as the “agreement”) deposited in the Archives of the United Nations.

note.heading: Short Title
note.p: Pub. L. 94–302, title II, § 201, May 31, 1976, 90 Stat. 593, provided that: “This title [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘African Development Fund Act’.”
